document.source_title: Ahmedabad, not Bengaluru, to host IPL 2026 final

claims.claim_text: The venue for the IPL 2026 final has been shifted from Bengaluru to Ahmedabad.
claims.evidence_text: The venue for the IPL 2026 final has been shifted from Bengaluru to Ahmedabad.

entities.name: BCCI
entities.description: Board of Control for Cricket in India
entities.evidence_text: the BCCI said in a statement.

entities.name: Narendra Modi Stadium
entities.description: Stadium in Ahmedabad where the IPL 2026 final will be held.
entities.evidence_text: the final will be played at the Narendra Modi Stadium in Ahmedabad on May 31

entities.name: HPCA Stadium
entities.evidence_text: the HPCA Stadium in Dharamsala will host the Qualifier 1 on May 26

entities.name: New International Cricket Stadium
entities.description: Stadium in New Chandigarh hosting Eliminator and Qualifier 2.
entities.evidence_text: the New International Cricket Stadium in New Chandigarh will stage the Eliminator (May 27) and Qualifier 2 (May 29)

entities.name: Royal Challengers Bengaluru
entities.description: IPL team that will not have home advantage for the final.
entities.evidence_text: Royal Challengers Bengaluru (RCB) will not have the home advantage should they get there.

entities.name: Punjab Kings
entities.description: IPL team currently on top of the points table.
entities.evidence_text: Punjab Kings (PBKS) are currently on top of the table with 13 points in nine matches.

events.evidence_text: the final will be played at the Narendra Modi Stadium in Ahmedabad on May 31
the HPCA Stadium in Dharamsala will host the Qualifier 1 on May 26

events.location: New International Cricket Stadium, New Chandigarh
events.evidence_text: the New International Cricket Stadium in New Chandigarh will stage the Eliminator (May 27)

events.location: New International Cricket Stadium, New Chandigarh
events.evidence_text: Qualifier 2 (May 29) will be staged at the New International Cricket Stadium in New Chandigarh.

citations.title: Ahmedabad, not Bengaluru, to host IPL 2026 final

source_credibility.reason: The source is a reputable sports news outlet.
